error_signature: Bad request - please check your parameters
title: WhatsApp template parameters issue
symptom: When using the WhatsApp 'send template' node, an error 'Bad request - please check your parameters' occurs due to incorrect parameter setup.
not_this_if: Using positional parameters in the template
root_cause: The WhatsApp API requires parameters to be sent in a specific format. If named parameters are used incorrectly or do not match the expected format, the API returns a bad request error.
fix_steps: Change the template to use positional parameters instead of named parameters
Ensure the number of parameters matches the number of placeholders in the template
Maintain the order of parameters as per the template's requirements
agent_instruction: Switch to using positional parameters in your WhatsApp template setup.
